## Weblinks to 2026 Buffett interview with CNBC Squawk

The following are the links to the transcript of 2026 Buffett interview with CNBC on March 31, 2026:

* [Video Recording of Buffett interview on CNBC’s Squawk program](https://www.cnbc.com/video/2026/03/31/watch-cnbcs-full-interview-with-berkshire-hathaway-chairman-warren-buffett.html)
* [Audio Recording of Buffet interview on CNBC’s Squawk program](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DtSrc1lgVpk)
* [Full transcript of Warren Buffett interview on CNBC’s Squawk program (original English version)](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/31/cnbc-exclusive-transcript-berkshire-hathaway-chairman-warren-buffett-speaks-with-cnbcs-becky-quick-on-squawk-box-today.html)
* [Full transcript of Buffett interview on CNBC’s Squawk program (Chinese translation)](https://finance.sina.com.cn/stock/usstock/c/2026-03-31/doc-inhswxzn3193901.shtml)

## Highlights to 2026 Buffett interview with CNBC Squawk

* Is the current US stock market price a worthwhile investment?
* What are the current market risks?
* Warren Buffett’s views on the Federal Reserve’s two main objectives.
* His views on Apple, Tim Cook, and Berkshire Hathaway’s current Apple investment and the possibility of reinvestment.
* His friendship with Bill Gates has been affected by scandals.
* His current daily work situation.
* This year’s Buffett lunch is different.
